title: Main Stadium Entrance Gate A
description: Primary entrance for general spectators. Includes ticket scanning, security checks, and information counters.
location: North side of the stadium near Parking Zone A
details: Gate A supports high crowd capacity and has separate lanes for regular, VIP, and accessible entry.

title: Wheelchair Accessible Entrance
description: Dedicated entrance designed for wheelchair users and visitors with mobility assistance requirements.
location: East side of the stadium near Accessible Parking Area
details: Includes ramps, elevators, priority security lanes, and assistance staff.

title: VIP Entrance Lounge
description: Premium entrance area for VIP guests, sponsors, and officials.
details: Provides private security screening, lounge access, hospitality services, and premium seating connectivity.

title: Food Court Area
description: Large food and beverage zone offering multiple cuisines and refreshments.
details: Contains vegetarian, international food stalls, water stations, and digital payment facilities.

title: Emergency Medical Center
description: Medical facility for handling spectator injuries and emergency situations.
details: Equipped with doctors, first aid stations, ambulances, and emergency response teams.

title: Lost and Found Center
description: Facility where spectators can report or collect lost items.
location: Main Information Desk near Gate B
details: Supports multilingual assistance and digital lost-item tracking.

title: Metro Shuttle Pickup Point
description: Dedicated transportation zone connecting the stadium with nearby metro stations.
details: Provides shuttle services before and after matches with real-time crowd updates.

title: Parking Zone A
description: Parking facility for private vehicles and ride-sharing drop-offs.
details: Includes EV charging stations, security monitoring, and digital parking guidance.

title: Fan Merchandise Store
description: Official store selling team jerseys, souvenirs, and tournament merchandise.
details: Supports digital payments and multilingual customer assistance.

title: Sustainability Information Zone
details: Displays information about renewable energy, waste management, recycling, and water conservation.

title: Security Control Room
description: Central monitoring facility for stadium safety operations.
details: Uses CCTV monitoring, crowd analytics, emergency alerts, and AI-based incident detection.

title: Family Seating Section
description: Dedicated seating area for families with children.
details: Provides comfortable seating, child assistance facilities, and nearby restrooms.
